basic_details.job_title: DHS Tiruvallur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 38 Medical Officer, Data Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer, Data Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Tiruvallur (DHS Tiruvallur) Medical Officer, Data Manager and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website tiruvallur.nic.in. A total of 38 vacancies have been announced through the DHS Tiruvallur Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limit varies by post, up to 50 years.
age_limit.details: Medical Officer: Maximum age 35 years. UHWC Staff Nurse: Maximum age 50 years. Audiologist: Maximum age 35 years. OT Assistant: Maximum age 35 years. Data Manager: Maximum age 40 years. Account Assistant: Maximum age 35 years. Auxiliary Nurse Mid Wives (ANM)/ Urban Health Nurse: Maximum age 35 years. Multipurpose Health Worker (Male)/Health Inspector Grade II: Maximum age 50 years. MMU Cleaner, Multi Purpose Hospital Worker: Maximum age 35 years. Driver: Maximum age 35 years. Lab Technician (Contract Post for Few Months Till MRB Requirement Completed): Maximum age 35 years. Senior Treatment Laboratory Supervisor (STLS): Maximum age 35 years. Counselor: Maximum age 40 years. Therapeutic Assistant: Maximum age 35 years. Yoga & Naturopathy Attender/MPHW: Maximum age 35 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Medical Officer, Data Manager and More qualifications from 8th pass to Post Graduate degrees in relevant fields.
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS degree recognized by Medical Council of India registered in Tamil Nadu Medical Council. UHWC Staff Nurse: DGNM/B.Sc Nursing /B.Sc Nursing with Integrated curriculum registered under TN Nursing Council. Audiologist: A bachelor on Audiology & Speech language pathology /B.Sc (Speech and hearing) from RCI recognized institute. OT Assistant: 3 months OT Technician Course from recognized University/Institutions. Data Manager: Post Graduate Qualification in Computer Science or BE in IT/ Electronics' with minimum 3 years of experience. Account Assistant: B.Com with Tally with 2 years of experience. Auxiliary Nurse Mid Wives (ANM)/ Urban Health Nurse: Auxiliary Nurse Mid Wives (ANM)/ registered under Tamil Nadu Nursing Council. Multipurpose Health Worker (Male)/Health Inspector Grade II: 12th with Biology/ Botany and Zoology, must have passed Tamil language as a subject in SSLC level, and possess two years for Multi- Purpose Health Worker(Male)/Health Inspector/ Sanitary Inspector Course training offered by recognized private institution/Trust/ Universities/ Deemed Universities including Gandhigram Rural Institute training course certificate granted by the Director of Public Health and Preventive Medicine. MMU Cleaner, Multi Purpose Hospital Worker: Minimum 8th Std Pass. Driver: 8th Pass with Valued Heavy Vehicle License. Lab Technician (Contract Post for Few Months Till MRB Requirement Completed): Must have passed 12th Standard with biology subject, and must have Passed Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology DMLT 2 years Course recognized by the Directorate of Medial Education. Senior Treatment Laboratory Supervisor (STLS): Must have Passed Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology DMLT 2 years Course recognized by the Directorate of Medial Education, permanent two wheeler driving license & should be able to drive two wheeler, and Certificate course in computer operations Minimum two months. Counselor: Any Post Graduate Degree in Psychology, Social work, Sociology, Anthropology or Human Diploma in Nursing, or Graduate degree in any field or Diploma in Nursing with minimum of 9 years of Experience in HIV/AIDS and for People living with HIV/(PLHIV) Graduate degree in any field or Diploma in Nursing with 1 year of Experience in HIV/AIDS. Therapeutic Assistant: Diploma in Nursing Therapist Course (For Certificates issued by Government of Tamil Nadu Only). Yoga & Naturopathy Attender/MPHW: Minimum 8th Std Pass and ability to read and write in Tamil.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Auxiliary Nurse Mid Wives (ANM)/ Urban Health Nurse
Multipurpose Health Worker (Male)/Health Inspector Grade II
MMU Cleaner, Multi Purpose Hospital Worker
Lab Technician (Contract Post for Few Months Till MRB Requirement Completed)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Tiruvallur Medical Officer, Data Manager and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tiruvallur.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DHS Tiruvallur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DHS Tiruvallur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 24th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in DHS Tiruvallur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 38 vacancies announced for various posts under the District Health Society Tiruvallur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for DHS Tiruvallur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for DHS Tiruvallur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required varies by post, starting from 8th pass up to Post Graduate degrees in relevant fields.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applying to DHS Tiruvallur posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the posts varies, with some posts having a limit of up to 50 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the posts in DHS Tiruvallur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly consolidated pay ranges from Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 63,000, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q7. Can I apply online for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the application process for DHS Tiruvallur Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Online applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Tiruvallur District: https://tiruvallur.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for DHS Tiruvallur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the posts in DHS Tiruvallur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The posts are on a contract basis, meaning they are temporary employment opportunities.
